title: stelis thelephora
intro: Stelis thelephora, also known as the leathery stelis, is a type of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Stelis thelephora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
